task:
Inkscape is open with /home/user/Documents/starpolygon.svg — a blank 600x600 document.

Edit /home/user/Documents/starpolygon.svg so it contains:
- A star shape (rendered as a `<path>` element) on the upper portion of the canvas.
- A regular polygon, e.g., a hexagon (rendered as a `<path>` element), on the lower portion of the canvas.
- A small circle element with id `marker` and fill #00ff00.
- A text element with the exact text: Star and Polygon.

The page must remain 600x600. Save the file in place.

verification.description: Document contains path elements (stars and polygons render as paths)
Text 'Star and Polygon' exists in the document
